---
title: "Collection Settings"
description: "Schema configuration options."
---

# Collection Settings

### labelPlural

**Type:** `string`

**Required:** No

**Default:** `null`

The plural label shown in the admin UI for the collection.

```json
{ "labelPlural": "Blog Posts" }
```

### sortBy

**Type:** `string`

**Required:** No

**Default:** `date:desc`

The default sort field and direction for the collection list view.
